description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, angular design and a polymer frame. The slide is matte black with aggressive front and rear serrations, and it features a mounted red dot optic on top. The grip is ergonomically contoured, with a two-tone finish and a textured pattern for enhanced handling, as well as visible fasteners and a checkered side panel. The trigger guard is large and squared, providing ample space and a tactical appearance. The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, contributing to a stable grip and quick reloads. Markings on the slide include the word 'ALIEN' and other subtle engravings, adding to its distinctive, high-tech look.
description: A modern, angular black handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, red dot optic, and distinctive slide markings. The design features a two-tone frame and aggressive serrations for a tactical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, red dot optic lens, and the squared trigger guard profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'ALIEN' marking, slide serrations, optic mount, and detailed grip texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backstrap texture, optic window, and the alignment of the grip and slide.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional slide serrations, optic mount, and the two-tone grip with visible fasteners.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a contoured ergonomic shape with a pronounced palm swell and a checkered side panel for enhanced traction. It has a two-tone color scheme, with the main body in dark olive and the checkered area in black. The surface is textured for a secure hold, and visible fasteners add a technical, modular appearance. The backstrap is subtly textured, and the overall design suggests comfort and control, with no visible finger grooves but a slight flare at the base for stability.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, squared-off, and robust, with a flat front edge and a slight undercut where it meets the grip. Its thickness suggests reinforcement for durability, and the ample space inside accommodates gloved fingers. The design is tactical and modern, with no visible texturing or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length for a full-size handgun, with a round profile and a visible muzzle opening. There are no external threads, ports, or compensators visible, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. The barrel appears to be integrated seamlessly with the slide, with no additional markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features the prominent 'ALIEN' marking in a modern, stylized font. Additional subtle engravings are present near the optic mount, including a triangle symbol and small text. The markings are cleanly engraved and add to the high-tech, distinctive appearance of the handgun.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight flare, providing a stable platform for reloads. It is black, matching the grip, and appears to be made of polymer or metal. The design is minimalist, with no finger rest, logos, or additional texturing visible, emphasizing function and ease of handling.
